ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buoys" (
  "buoy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buoy */,
  "buoy_name" TEXT /* Name of the buoy */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the buoy (e.g., ocean, sea, lake) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the buoy */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the buoy */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* The data collection method used by the buoy */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* The date the buoy was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the buoy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buoy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buoys_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., land, airport) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* The data collection method used by the weather station */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* The date the weather station was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., buoy, weather station) */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (buoy or weather station) that collected the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* The type of data collected */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* The unit of measurement for the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The dataset this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The dataset this metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* The key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* The value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wind data belongs to */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wave_data" (
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wave data belongs to */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Wave height in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wave_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "atmos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atmospheric data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the atmospheric data belongs to */,
  "atmos_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atmos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
